title: IM IMG culture
content: Very welcoming to international graduates; many senior residents are IMGs.

title: Interview vibe
content: Virtual interview day was well organized with faculty and current residents.

title: Visa guidance
content: Coordinator provides clear J1 paperwork checklist after rank list release.

title: Housing tip
content: Look for sublets in nearby neighborhoods; hospital housing availability is limited.

title: Cost note
content: Interview costs are low because program offered virtual interviews this cycle.

title: Research note
content: Academic track and QI projects are easy to join; import research month later.
